Home › Programs

Programs

By Age Group

Find the Right Program

Ages 4–6

Little Kickers ⚽

Introduction to the ball, basic movement, and the joy of sport. Low-pressure, high-fun sessions focused on love of the game.

 Ages 7–9

Juniors 🏃

Building fundamentals — passing, dribbling, and first experiences with team play and coachability.

 Ages 10–13

Academy 🌟

Tactical development, competitive scrimmages, and mentorship — on and off the field.
Ages 4–6 · Little Kickers

Youth Soccer Classes

Free, structured coaching for youth across LA — taught by coaches who genuinely believe in every kid on the field.

  • Open to all skill levels, no experience required
  • Qualified coaches with youth development backgrounds
  • No cost to families
School Partnership

Public School Support

Programs delivered directly onto school campuses — no transportation, no sign-up friction, just a coach waiting after class.

  • On-site sessions that fit school schedules
  • Partnerships with LAUSD and local schools
  • Equipment provided to every school
Access Program

Equipment & Access

No child sits out because their family can't afford cleats. Gear goes directly to kids who need it, at no cost.

  • Cleats, shin guards, uniforms, and balls
  • Training equipment for school sites
  • Gently used gear donations accepted
Community

Community Initiatives

Mentorship, events, and programs that extend the mission beyond the final whistle.

  • Youth mentorship with positive role models
  • Community tournaments and events
  • Family and parent engagement
How It Works

Simple. Free. Effective.

📍

Find a Location

We work within schools and community spaces — wherever kids already are.

🤝

Partner Up

Schools or orgs reach out. We handle staffing, curriculum, and equipment.

⚽

Programs Begin

Coaches show up. Kids play. Character builds alongside skill.

🌟

Lives Change

Confidence, discipline, and belonging — on and off the field.

Equitable access to soccer for every kid in Los Angeles.
